summary: Completed comprehensive testing of DioCreations site-wide accent color feature (iteration 7). All tests PASSED. The accent color (picked randomly per session) now applies consistently across ALL pages - Homepage, About, Services, Products, Portfolio, Blog, Contact. CSS variables (--primary, --ring, --accent, --secondary, --secondary-foreground) are set by Layout.jsx and inherited by all pages via Tailwind's bg-primary, text-primary, etc. classes.
passed_tests: Layout.jsx fetches /api/homepage/content and sets CSS variables based on random color scheme
sessionStorage stores color_idx to persist accent color during session
Homepage renders with accent color on buttons, badges, stats, gradients
About page uses same accent color (badges bg-primary/10, buttons bg-primary, CTA gradient from-primary to-primary/80)
Services page uses dynamic accent (badges, card icons, CTA section gradient)
Products page uses dynamic accent (badges, pricing cards, CTA gradient)
Portfolio page uses dynamic accent (badges, card borders on hover)
Blog page uses dynamic accent (badges, card borders on hover)
Contact page uses dynamic accent (badges, contact icons, form submit button)
Navbar 'Get Started' button matches accent color (bg-primary)
Footer social icons use hover:bg-primary correctly
CSS gradient classes (gradient-violet, gradient-violet-subtle) use hsl(var(--primary)) - confirmed
Dio chatbot header gradient uses accent color (gradient-violet class using CSS variables)
Hover states on outline buttons show accent-colored background
Color rotation works: tested ORANGE (index 4), BLUE (index 1), and confirmed different colors on refresh
No hardcoded violet classes remain in public-facing page components
context_for_next_testing_agent: Site-wide accent color is fully functional. Layout.jsx fetches /api/homepage/content, extracts active color_schemes, picks random one (stored in sessionStorage as 'color_idx'), and sets CSS variables on the wrapper div. All Tailwind classes like bg-primary, text-primary, bg-primary/10, border-primary/20 inherit from these variables. The CSS classes gradient-violet, gradient-violet-subtle, text-gradient, hover-lift, pulse-glow in index.css all use hsl(var(--primary)). Tested colors: violet (265 80% 50%), blue (221 83% 53%), teal (172 66% 50%), pink (333 71% 51%), orange (25 95% 53%). To test different colors, clear sessionStorage before navigation.

features_verified.services_page_accent: Working - All accent elements use CSS variables
features_verified.products_page_accent: Working - All accent elements use CSS variables
features_verified.portfolio_page_accent: Working - All accent elements use CSS variables
features_verified.blog_page_accent: Working - All accent elements use CSS variables
features_verified.contact_page_accent: Working - All accent elements use CSS variables
features_verified.dio_chat_accent: Working - Header uses gradient-violet class with CSS variables
features_verified.color_rotation: Working - Different colors (ORANGE, BLUE) confirmed on session clear + reload
